text: They who can give up essential liberty to obtain a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.
context: Warning against trading freedom for security theater.

text: We must, indeed, all hang together, or most assuredly we shall all hang separately.
Well done is better than well said.
Diligence is the mother of good luck.
context: Luck as the child of work.

text: Lost time is never found again.
I agree to this Constitution with all its faults, if they are such.
In this world nothing can be said to be certain, except death and taxes.
context: A durable American joke with bite.

text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
